calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Ownership Of Estate Property And Authorize Conveyance From Wells Fargo Advisors
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Geoffrey Wiggs for Madelyn Fossat, Administrator (via Zoom).
Adriana Erquiaga for Wells Fargo Bank and Wells Fargo Advisors Financial Network, Respondent (via Zoom).

The Court inquired whether counsel had reviewed the tentative ruling. Both counsel confirmed they had reviewed it. Mr. Wiggs clarified that the petitioner is both the personal representative and one of the few remaining beneficiaries of the estate. He stated that the relief requested did not constitute a civil cause of action, as no damages were being sought-only confirmation of the estate's interest in the subject account and release of its contents.

Ms. Erquiaga confirmed that Wells Fargo accepted service of the petition and did not oppose the petition. She reported to the Court that the parties were in the final stages of coordinating the transfer of securities, pending updated authorization documentation with proper account information.

Following discussion, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition To Confirm Ownership Of Estate Property And Authorize Conveyance From Wells Fargo Advisors

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Geoffrey Wiggs for and with Madelyn Fossat.

Mr. Wigg stated that no interest has been assigned, that nothing is going to anyone under a power of attorney or any other representation as to the three Beneficiaries, that Paul has passed away and that his distribution is going to his estate. The Court stated that it needs that in writing, that a contingent fee agreement has to be authorized by the Court, and that its understanding is that the Decedent entered into the contingent fee agreement with him, but the Petitioner entered into it without Court authorization. The Court also noted that parking, dining and travel are not recoverable under probate, but can be under contingent fee agreement. Mr. Wiggins stated that those expenses are recoverable under paragraph 6 of the fee agreement, read language and stated that he will file it. The Court raised the issue of taxes and the reserve noting that there is no need for a substantial reserve because any tax liability would be de minimus. Mr. Wiggs stated that they did not receive any W-2's, that they did not check for prior taxes and that they did not have copies of prior tax records. Mr. Wiggs is to file the fee agreement and a statement as to there being no assignments or Power-of-Attorney. The Second Account and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission. The Court informed Mr. Wiggs that if it approves the petition and there ends up being a tax liability, it would be on the Administrator.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-29-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Geoffrey Wiggs for (personal Representative) Madelyn Fossat.

The Court stated that there are a couple of issues and cited 12201 in regards to the notice. Mr. Wiggs stated that it was corrected and served on 8/29/16, that they had issues filing the document, that regarding the Inventory & Appraisal they are finally in contact with the probate referee, that in regards to the verification it was done by the personal representative (and provided a copy to the Court), that they completed a two week trial in July which is still under submission, that it may be appealed and that they will have the Inventory & Appraisal to the appraiser by the end of the week. The probate accounting status report was taken under submission. A status was set for the filing of the Inventory & Appraisal on October 31, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Continued To Sep-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Geoffrey Wiggs (via court call) for Madelyn Fossat.

The Court notified counsel that he needs to file a proper notice with language from 12201 as well as a verification from his client and a proposed order. The Probate Accounting Status Report was continued to September 19, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
